content.text:
<user_query>
Thoroughly investigate the campaign creation flow in the org-next app. I need to understand:

1. Read apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/index.tsx - the homepage that has the modal for creating campaigns
2. Read apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/campaigns/new.tsx - campaign creation page
3. Read apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/campaigns/$campaignId.tsx - campaign detail page
4. Read apps/org-next/src/server/campaigns.ts - server-side campaign functions
5. Read packages/api-client/src/hooks/org-next/campaigns.ts - campaign API hooks

Return the full contents of all these files.
</user_query>

Reading all five files and returning their full contents.

[REDACTED]

Searching for the api-client campaigns hooks file — it wasn't at the expected path.

[REDACTED]
